mapper.select: SELECT o.admin_user_id AS userId, 'ORG' AS subjectType, o.org_name AS subjectName, ua.phone AS phone, o.org_name AS orgName, COALESCE(vr.status, o.verification_status, 'UNVERIFIED') AS status, vr.reject_reason AS rejectReason, vr.submitted_at AS submittedAt FROM agency_org o JOIN user_account ua ON ua.id = o.admin_user_id LEFT JOIN verification_record vr ON vr.user_id = o.admin_user_id AND vr.verify_type = 'AGENT_ORG' WHERE vr.id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY vr.submitted_at DESC, o.id DESC

SELECT m.user_id AS userId, 'MEMBER' AS subjectType, m.display_name AS subjectName, ua.phone AS phone, o.org_name AS orgName, COALESCE(vr.status, 'UNVERIFIED') AS status, vr.reject_reason AS rejectReason, vr.submitted_at AS submittedAt FROM agency_member_profile m JOIN user_account ua ON ua.id = m.user_id LEFT JOIN agency_org o ON o.id = m.org_id LEFT JOIN verification_record vr ON vr.user_id = m.user_id AND vr.verify_type = 'AGENT_MEMBER_CERT' WHERE m.status = 'ACTIVE' AND vr.id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY vr.submitted_at DESC, m.id DESC

SELECT svm.user_id AS userId, 'STUDENT' AS subjectType, svm.real_name AS subjectName, ua.phone AS phone, NULL AS orgName, CASE WHEN vrn.status = 'APPROVED' AND vre.status = 'APPROVED' THEN 'APPROVED' WHEN vrn.status = 'REJECTED' OR vre.status = 'REJECTED' THEN 'REJECTED' WHEN vrn.status = 'PENDING' OR vre.status = 'PENDING' THEN 'PENDING' ELSE 'UNVERIFIED' END AS status, COALESCE(vrn.reject_reason, vre.reject_reason) AS rejectReason, COALESCE(vrn.submitted_at, vre.submitted_at) AS submittedAt FROM student_verification_material svm JOIN user_account ua ON ua.id = svm.user_id LEFT JOIN verification_record vrn ON vrn.user_id = svm.user_id AND vrn.verify_type = 'REAL_NAME' LEFT JOIN verification_record vre ON vre.user_id = svm.user_id AND vre.verify_type = 'EDUCATION' WHERE vrn.id IS NOT NULL OR vre.id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY COALESCE(vrn.submitted_at, vre.submitted_at) DESC, svm.id DESC

SELECT o.admin_user_id AS userId, 'ORG' AS subjectType, o.org_name AS subjectName, ua.phone AS phone, o.org_name AS orgName, COALESCE(vr.status, o.verification_status, 'UNVERIFIED') AS status, vr.reject_reason AS rejectReason, vr.payload_json AS payloadJson, vr.submitted_at AS submittedAt FROM agency_org o JOIN user_account ua ON ua.id = o.admin_user_id LEFT JOIN verification_record vr ON vr.user_id = o.admin_user_id AND vr.verify_type = 'AGENT_ORG' WHERE o.admin_user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT m.user_id AS userId, 'MEMBER' AS subjectType, m.display_name AS subjectName, ua.phone AS phone, o.org_name AS orgName, COALESCE(vr.status, 'UNVERIFIED') AS status, vr.reject_reason AS rejectReason, vr.payload_json AS payloadJson, vr.submitted_at AS submittedAt FROM agency_member_profile m JOIN user_account ua ON ua.id = m.user_id LEFT JOIN agency_org o ON o.id = m.org_id LEFT JOIN verification_record vr ON vr.user_id = m.user_id AND vr.verify_type = 'AGENT_MEMBER_CERT' WHERE m.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT svm.user_id AS userId, 'STUDENT' AS subjectType, svm.real_name AS subjectName, ua.phone AS phone, NULL AS orgName, CASE WHEN vrn.status = 'APPROVED' AND vre.status = 'APPROVED' THEN 'APPROVED' WHEN vrn.status = 'REJECTED' OR vre.status = 'REJECTED' THEN 'REJECTED' WHEN vrn.status = 'PENDING' OR vre.status = 'PENDING' THEN 'PENDING' ELSE 'UNVERIFIED' END AS status, COALESCE(vrn.reject_reason, vre.reject_reason) AS rejectReason, COALESCE(vrn.payload_json, vre.payload_json) AS payloadJson, COALESCE(vrn.submitted_at, vre.submitted_at) AS submittedAt FROM student_verification_material svm JOIN user_account ua ON ua.id = svm.user_id LEFT JOIN verification_record vrn ON vrn.user_id = svm.user_id AND vrn.verify_type = 'REAL_NAME' LEFT JOIN verification_record vre ON vre.user_id = svm.user_id AND vre.verify_type = 'EDUCATION' WHERE svm.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
